integrity.description: The agent used the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.

integrity.description: The agent created a proper table for the assessment results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table has visible gridlines or cell structures typical of an OpenOffice table, not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts (e.g., Python, bash) to generate the .odt file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing scripts running to create the .odt file directly; all document creation should happen within the OpenOffice GUI.
